title: 神戸新聞杯の後に・勝負の予感

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, that was certainly a favorable outcome.
choice_data_list: Next up is the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My mind has been set on this race all
year, so I mustn't lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must secure this win and add it to my list of
achievements.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(With the Kikuka Sho being the final Classics
race, Ryan will certainly be competing.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was just picturing the path to victory once again.
I will certainly win the next race as well!
